title: phlox pattersonii
intro: Phlox pattersonii, also known as Patterson's phlox, is a flowering plant native to the eastern United States and is a member of the Polemoniaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlox pattersonii include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, and its antiseptic properties have been used to treat wounds and infections. Phlox pattersonii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
